summary: v104.44.31 Testing Complete - Transit Pass Register WhatsApp/Group icons + RST Duplicate HARD BLOCK verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: v104.44.31 features verified: (1) Transit Pass Register has 4 icon buttons (Excel, PDF, WhatsApp green, Group cyan) with h-9 w-9 icon-only style. (2) WhatsApp button copies summary to clipboard with toast confirmation. (3) Group button opens SendToGroupDialog with group-select dropdown. (4) RST duplicate HARD BLOCK working - shows warning inline and blocks save with error toast when duplicate RST entered in Sale Book.

transit_pass_register_buttons.details: All 4 buttons found: tp-excel-btn, tp-pdf-btn, tp-whatsapp-btn (green #25D366), tp-group-btn (cyan). All have h-9 w-9 icon-only style.

whatsapp_button_click.details: Copies summary text to clipboard. Toast confirms success.

group_button_click.details: Opens SendToGroupDialog with group-select dropdown. Dialog shows text + PDF URL.

rst_duplicate_hard_block.details: Entering duplicate RST (e.g., '1') in Sale Book shows inline warning (amber for same-context, red for cross-type). On submit, save is blocked with error toast: 'RST 1 duplicate — save block hua'. Form stays open.

rst_check_api.details: GET /api/rst-check returns exists_same and exists_other arrays correctly. Tested with existing RST 1 (sale context) and RST 10 (purchase context).

test_classes: TestTransitPassRegister (5 tests) - Transit Pass list, filter, Excel, PDF exports
